notes: Prices scraped from studio websites. 'verified: true' means prices were found on the website. 'verified: false' means prices could not be confirmed online.

yogastudio-luzern.notes: Pricing page exists but prices are embedded in an image (Preise Abos.jpg). Could not extract text values.

liv-lab.notes: 10-class card valid 6 months. 20-class card 553 CHF (12 months). Monthly = 1-month unlimited. Student discount 20%. Livestream single 22 CHF.

ashtanga-luzern.notes: Pricing page exists. Meta description says trial classes at half price for first-time local students. Content rendered dynamically, prices not extractable.

original-hot-yoga-luzern.trial_note: 10 days unlimited access for 50 CHF (new members only)
original-hot-yoga-luzern.notes: Trial offer confirmed (10 days / 50 CHF). Full pricing handled via Eversports app, not on website.

mii-ruum.notes: Single Cat 1: 35, Cat 2 (Aerial): 38. 5er-Abo 170 (12 weeks, incl. Aerial). Monthly unlimited 240 (30 days, excl. pre/postnatal). Annual 40-lesson pass 1020. Annual unlimited 1999. Private 120/h, Aerial private 130/h.

yogagemeinschaft-luzern.notes: No pricing found on website. Classes recognized by health insurance.

studio-fayo.notes: Drop-in 34 CHF. 10-class pass 300 (valid 6 months). 3-month sub 650. FAYO Lab 38. Private 130. 10% discount for students and seniors.

yogasitz-luzern.notes: Booking page found but no prices displayed. Courses recognized by health insurance.

om-shanti-luzern.notes: Schedule page found but no pricing information displayed.

yogaraum-luzern.notes: Single 30 CHF, trial 25 CHF, 10er Abo 250 (valid 4 months). Private 120 CHF/60min. Health insurance reimbursement possible.

yoga-mit-herz.notes: Single 35, trial 25. Trimester-based subscription: 28/class (75min). Student trimester: 26/class. Private 120 CHF/60min, semi-private 160/60min for 2.

der-raum-horw.notes: Single 75min 29 CHF. Online single 20 CHF. Free trial lesson. Private 120 CHF/60min. Saturday workshop 50 CHF/2.5h. Yin Yoga Friday 50 CHF/2.5h.

kundalini-yoga-emmen.notes: No pricing found on website. Course descriptions only.

pure-you-yoga-horw.notes: Pricing page exists (abo-preise) but Wix site renders dynamically, content not extractable.

yoga-veda-luzern.notes: Teacher training focused. Workshop pricing only. Regular class prices not listed.

yogakurse-horw.notes: Wix site renders dynamically, content not extractable.
